creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Niclas from comment #18)
We can't always help if people do silly things. If you change the options of a dependency, everything that depends on it should technically be rebuilt. There are many other cases in the ports tree where if you change an option in a dependency, the ports that depend on it won't work without rebuilding them. We can't always stop people from shooting themselves in the foot, but since it is recommended these days to use synth or poudriere to build packages and upgrade that way, it mostly eliminates the possibility of this scenario happening.

I feel comfortable committing as-is. Now, if you would like to be set as the maintainer of rar2fs, let me know. If not, I'll take it so it doesn't get left to ports@, but I'd rather have someone who uses it on a regular basis be the maintainer.
